text: Stepping into this space, I am struck by the interplay between transparency and enclosure, the world observed through glass yet separated by it. Inside, vivid colors and glowing screens invite curiosity and contemplation. I feel both exposed and isolated, a witness to the merging of research and design, surrounded by symbols of inquiry. The lighting is soft, almost dreamlike, fostering a sense of quiet anticipation. In this carefully crafted environment, I sense the presence of thought, of potential collaboration and possibility, and I find myself suspended between observation and participation, content to linger in this thoughtful liminality.
